---
name: Outdated Information
about: Report a tax rate, policy, or cost that has changed
title: "[UPDATE] "
labels: outdated-info
assignees: ''
---

**Which file?**
e.g., `references/jurisdictions.md`

**What changed?**
e.g., "Singapore corporate tax rate changed from 17% to X%"

**Source**
Link to official government/tax authority source

**Date of change**
When did this take effect?
